seoTitle: Clifford vs Clifton Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clifford and Clifton Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clifford vs Clifton Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clifford and Clifton Beach.
heading: Clifford vs Clifton Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clifford, Queensland and Clifton Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clifton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Clifford (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clifford or Clifton Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clifford has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Clifton Beach scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clifford scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Clifton Beach scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clifford or Clifton Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clifton Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
